data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'work completed summary by trade/area', but the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for a work completed summary, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of relevant data or endpoints to verify this specific requirement leads to a failed status.
gaps: No evidence of a work completed summary by trade/area.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
